name: Collab Z Inc.
business: Collab Z Inc. provides a community-based property management platform that involves tenants in management tasks. The company earns revenue from property management fees, development and construction management, procurement, renovation management, EB-5 immigration investor services, and consulting services. Its customers include property owners, tenants, community pros, professional service providers, and real estate developers.

exposures.sentence: AI-enhanced features for our Collab Platform are currently under development, with phased launches planned over an 18-month period that had begun in early 2025.

As we plan to expand to the PropTech industry in the future and transition ourselves from a standard property developer to a tech, AI based innovator, we believe we will become subject to various risks related to AI and technology, including the following:

catalysts.sentence: AI-enhanced features for our Collab Platform are currently under development, with phased launches planned over an 18-month period that had begun in early 2025.
Construction commenced in October 2022 and was completed in May 2025.

Planned as a 20-story student housing building with 169 units and 513 beds, this project covers 145,920 square feet and is currently in the entitlement process, with an anticipated completion date of August 2030.

catalysts.event: Phase out of EB-5 Immigration Investor Services
catalysts.sentence: Reflecting our strategic refocus, we plan to phase out EB-5 Immigration Investor Services beginning in the next year.

tamClaims.claim: According to IBIS World, the property management industry reached $128.3 billion by the end of 2024, growing at a CAGR of 2.0%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to IBIS World, the property management industry reached $128.3 billion in revenue by the end of 2024, growing at a CAGR of 2.0%.

tamClaims.claim: With over 300,000 property management companies and 20 million rental properties in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: With over 300,000 property management companies and 20 million rental properties in the U.S. (Sources: Truelist, February 2024; Rubyhome, August 2023)
